_comment: PLACEHOLDER - Draft geometry. Replace with actual boundaries from USFS, NPS, PADUS, or Minnesota DNR.

properties.label: Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness (BWCAW)
properties.managing_agency: U.S. Forest Service - Superior National Forest
properties.babbitt_proximity_note: BWCAW southern boundary is approximately 5-10 miles north of Babbitt. Closer to the city than the Ely-area copper projects. Water quality and noise impacts from processing facility would be evaluated relative to this proximity.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with PADUS or USFS official boundary

properties.label: Superior National Forest
properties.babbitt_proximity_note: The Babbitt lease area may overlap with or abut Superior National Forest lands. Any surface operations on SNF lands require USFS special use authorization in addition to state permits.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with USFS official boundary

properties.label: Bear Island State Forest
properties.notes: State forest lands in the Babbitt area. Minnesota DNR manages mineral leasing on state lands; forest land designation may affect surface operations permitting.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with MN DNR official boundary

properties.label: Voyageurs National Park
properties.notes: Northwest of Babbitt; water quality in connected Rainy River watershed. Farther from proposed helium lease area than from Ely-area copper projects.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with NPS official boundary
